blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,114 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
